violations.text: Steak, eggs, and oysters are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment is to add a consumer advisory with indicating symbols next to items that are raw or undercooked to both the breakfast and dinner menus. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink for the bar area in the dining room. The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink for the bar in the dining room. Establishment is to install 3-bay sink for bar area to facilitate manual ware-washing of dishes and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2026

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (toast) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Food items were disposed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Steak, eggs, and oysters are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment is to add a consumer advisory with indicating symbols next to items that are raw or undercooked to both the breakfast and dinner menus. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink for the bar area in the dining room. The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink for the bar in the dining room. Establishment is to install 3-bay sink for bar area to facilitate manual ware-washing of dishes and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2026
The 3-bay sink drain in the kitchen area was observed to be leaking and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Raw animal foods (Shell Eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked bacon and tortillas) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC moved food items underneath raw eggs during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
